name: Seiten Gokuwmon

signature_move.name: Kagan Kinsei
signature_move.description: Makes its eyes glow with flame-like light, temporarily increasing its power.

description: The end of a long journey in search of truth doctrines. What it acquired during that journey was a power that embodies unity. Seiten Gokuwmon is a Tathāgata Digimon that evolved when Sanzomon used its sutras to elevate the bonds it had with Cho·Hakkaimon and Sagomon —whom it traveled alongside and grew up with—into a new power. Although its inherently belligerent nature remains unchanged, it is no longer as arrogant as it used to be, and has grown into a warrior who combines combat instinct with composure. Its spirit is not the only thing that has grown. The golden decorations on its back are " Kintoun ", which it transforms into a thundercloud to use. The " Nyoikinkobō ", which it used regularly, has taken in the power of its companions and combined it with Gokuwmon 's abilities, which enhanced it into the " Nyoitenjinbō ", a weapon capable of freely changing shape that harnesses three attributes—thunder, fire, and water. Freely wielding sorcery and martial arts, it has become a powerful Digimon who is truly worthy of being called a mighty warrior. While it is a Digimon of the strongest class, rivaling the guardians of the Eastern Digital World , the Tentei Hachibushu , it is a free being who is neither bound by destiny nor constraints, so Erlangmon has been keeping a close watch on its every move. Its Special Moves are making its eyes glow with flame-like light, temporarily increasing its strength ( Kagan Kinsei ), sending out flames from the Nyoitenjinbō and striking while preserving their power ( Hakkai Entengeki ), and similarly, generating a violent whirlpool to engulf the opponent ( Gojō Suitensō ), and transforming the Nyoitenjinbō into a bazooka, concentrating lightning, and then firing it ( Chōtai Seirai Tenhō ).
